headline: Is LXP Industrial Trust a Buy or Sell After Pensionfund PDN Dumped Shares Worth $6.4 Million?
summary: This REIT focuses on single-tenant industrial properties nationwide, emphasizing stable cash flows and a strong dividend yield.
